attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "You are a project risk analyst. Based on the scan results below, write:
1. A concise proactive_message (2-3 sentences, suitable for a Slack alert)
2. A list of top recommendations (max 3, each under 15 words)
3. overall_health: one of "Healthy", "Needs Attention", "At Risk", "Critical"
4. critical_count: integer count of critical/overdue risks found

Scan results:
🚨 RISK: 6 OVERDUE ISSUE(S) DETECTED

  ⏰ #21 [E-Learning Platform] Add real-time chat between students and instructors
     → Overdue by 45 day(s) | Assignee: Amir  Backend | Due: 2026-02-28 | Status: New
  ⏰ #22 [E-Learning Platform] Video streaming freezes on slow internet connections
     → Overdue by 30 day(s) | Assignee: Abir Mobile | Due: 2026-03-15 | Status: In Progress
  ⏰ #28 [E-Learning Platform] Course search returns incorrect results when using filters
     → Overdue by 4 day(s) | Assignee: Alice Fullstack | Due: 2026-04-10 | Status: New
  ⏰ #24 [E-Learning Platform] Optimize homepage loading speed by lazy loading images
     → Overdue by 4 day(s) | Assignee: Amira Frontend | Due: 2026-04-10 | Status: Closed
  ⏰ #7 [E-Learning Platform] Mobile app crashes when enrolling in course with >50 lessons
     → Overdue by 3 day(s) | Assignee: Abir Mobile | Due: 2026-04-11 | Status: New
  ⏰ #37 [E-Learning Platform] Checkout error
     → Overdue by 2 day(s) | Assignee: Alice Fullstack | Due: 2026-04-12 | Status: New

📊 IMPACT: 6 issue(s) are blocking on-time delivery.

🚨 RISK: 1 HIGH-PRIORITY ISSUE(S) DUE IN ≤3 DAYS

  🚨 #10 [E-Learning Platform] Payment processing times out for courses over $100
     → Due in 3 day(s) | Priority: High | Assignee: Amira Frontend

⚡ RECOMMENDATION: Escalate these issues immediately to avoid breach.

⚠️ RISK: 2 STUCK ISSUE(S) WITH NO PROGRESS ≥5 DAYS

  💤 #27 [E-Learning Platform] Migrate legacy API endpoints to new architecture
     → No update for 5 day(s) | Assignee: Abir Mobile | Status: In Progress
  💤 #22 [E-Learning Platform] Video streaming freezes on slow internet connections
     → No update for 5 day(s) | Assignee: Abir Mobile | Status: In Progress

🔍 RECOMMENDATION: Check with assignees for blockers. Consider reassigning or breaking issues into smaller tasks.

📌 RISK: 9 UNASSIGNED OPEN ISSUE(S)

  👤 #44 [Mobile App] payment crash
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #43 [Mobile App] payment crash
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #42 [Mobile App] payment crash
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #41 [Mobile App] payment crash
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #40 [Mobile App] payment crash
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #39 [Mobile App] payment crash
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #38 [Mobile App] payment crash
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #34 [E-Learning Platform] login functionality
     → Priority: Normal | Due: None | Status: New
  👤 #31 [web Platform] Fix payment bug
     → Priority: High | Due: None | Status: New

📋 RECOMMENDATION: Assign these issues to team members to ensure accountability.

✅ RISK CHECK PASSED: No team member has more than 10 open tasks.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown:
{"critical_count": 0, "overall_health": "...", "proactive_message": "...", "recommendations": ["..."]}", "tool_calls": null, "refusal": null, "tool_call_id": null}]}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"choices": [{"message": {"role": "assistant", "content": "{\"critical_count\":6,\"overall_health\":\"Critical\",\"proactive_message\":\"🚨 6 issues are overdue, including a high‑priority payment timeout due in 3 days. Additionally, 2 issues have stalled ≥5 days and 9 remain unassigned. Immediate action is required to avoid delivery impact.\",\"recommendations\":[\"Escalate overdue and high‑priority issues to leads immediately.\",\"Follow up with assignees on stalled tasks; consider reassignment or splitting.\",\"Assign all unassigned high‑priority tickets to owners today.\"]}", "tool_calls": null, "refusal": null, "tool_call_id": null}, "finish_reason": null}]}
